Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Links dynamic strings to the current Git hash of the repository.
Changed_Other.purpose: Helps developers track changes and versions of their code more easily.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Adjusts how timestamps are formatted in dynamic strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures that players see updated and correctly formatted timestamps in the game.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores a fast string representation of the Git hash for version tracking.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves performance by speeding up the retrieval of version information.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Implements a faster method for handling string timestamps.
Changed_Other.purpose: Increases efficiency in time-related operations, leading to smoother gameplay experiences.

Added_Other.name: DFFlagUseModelInsteadOfItsParent_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Changes how models are referenced in the system to use the model itself instead of its parent.
Added_Other.purpose: Simplifies development and enhances performance by reducing complexity in model handling.

Added_Other.name: DFIntGetMeshPartJointOffsetTelemetryThrottle
Added_Other.mechanism: Controls the frequency of telemetry data collection for mesh part joint offsets.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves performance by reducing unnecessary data collection, leading to smoother gameplay.

Added_Other.name: FFlagAXMISRemoveSingleItemPurchaseFromTryOn
Added_Other.mechanism: Removes the option to try on items that can only be purchased individually.
Added_Other.purpose: Simplifies the try-on experience, allowing players to focus on items available for multiple purchases.

Added_Network.name: FFlagDelayAudioFocusReplication
Added_Network.mechanism: Delays the synchronization of audio focus changes across clients.
Added_Network.purpose: Improves audio experience by reducing abrupt changes in sound when players interact with audio sources.

Removed_Other.name: DFIntGetMeshPartJointOffsetTelemetryThrottle_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Limits the frequency of telemetry data collection for mesh part joint offsets.
Removed_Other.purpose: Improves performance by reducing unnecessary data processing.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagAXMISRemoveSingleItemPurchaseFromTryOn_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Removes the option to try on single items before purchasing.
Removed_Other.purpose: Simplifies the purchasing process for players by eliminating unnecessary steps.

Removed_Network.name: FFlagDelayAudioFocusReplication_Staged
Removed_Network.mechanism: Introduces a delay in audio focus changes during gameplay.
Removed_Network.purpose: Improves audio experience by preventing abrupt sound changes.

Added_Other.name: DFFlagPMDHeaderBlockDetection
Added_Other.mechanism: Implements detection for header blocks in PMD files to prevent errors.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances the stability of importing PMD files, leading to fewer crashes and better performance for creators.

Added_Other.name: FFlagLoadRawBytecodeWithHashKey
Added_Other.mechanism: Enables loading of bytecode with a hash key for verification.
Added_Other.purpose: Increases security and integrity of game scripts.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSimPartOperationRemoveCSGMesh8
Added_Other.mechanism: Removes certain operations related to CSG (Constructive Solid Geometry) meshes in simulations.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves performance and stability when using complex shapes in games.
